Our Products

AI tutors for every stage of learning

Three distinct apps built for different grade levels.

2nd–6th Grade
TeachTales
Elementary School

Story-driven AI learning that makes young students fall in love with history and science through interactive adventures.

Athena Jr.
Middle School

Adaptive AI curriculum accelerating middle schoolers through every core subject with personalized pacing and instant feedback.

Join Waitlist →
9th–12th Grade
Athena
High School

Master every AP exam and dominate the SAT with AI tutors who adapt to your weaknesses and keep you engaged.

How It Works

The AI education model that actually works

01
Personalized Assessment

Our AI identifies exactly where your child stands and builds a custom curriculum around their strengths and gaps.

02
Learn from Legends

AI personas of history's greatest thinkers deliver engaging short-form lessons that hold attention better than any textbook.

03
Active Practice & Feedback

Instant AI feedback after every lesson closes knowledge gaps in real-time and reinforces long-term retention.

04
Parent Dashboard

Full visibility into progress, time on task, mastery by topic, and projected exam outcomes — always in the loop.

Simple, transparent pricing

Basic
Free/mo
Get started with core content
  • ✓1 Subject Access
  • ✓20 Lessons / Month
  • ✓Basic Progress Tracking
  • ✓Mobile App Access
Most Popular
Pro
$29/mo
Everything a student needs
  • ✓All Subjects Unlimited
  • ✓Unlimited Lessons
  • ✓Full AP Exam Prep
  • ✓SAT Practice Tests
  • ✓Parent Dashboard
  • ✓AI Tutor Chat Access
Family
$49/mo
Up to 4 children
  • ✓Everything in Pro
  • ✓Up to 4 Student Profiles
  • ✓Unified Parent Dashboard
  • ✓Priority Support
